# Part 17 — Statements of Truth

## PART 17 E+W STATEMENTS OF TRUTH


### [ F1 Interpretation E+W


17.1. — [ F2 (1) ] In this Part “statement of case” has the meaning given to it in Part 4 except that a statement of case does not include—


[ F6 (2) In this rule, “Financial Circumstances Form” has the meaning given to it in rule 9.3(1). ]


(Rule 4.1 defines “statement of case” for the purposes of Part 4.) ]


Textual Amendments


F1 Rule 17.1 substituted (18.6.2011) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2011 (S.I. 2011/1328) , rules 1 , 14


F2 Rule 17.1 renumbered as rule 17.1(1) (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 14(a)


F3 Rule 17.1(1)(a) omitted (7.8.2017) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2017 (S.I. 2017/741) , rules 1(1) , 8 (with rule 9 )


F4 Rule 17.1(1)(b) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 11(2) ; 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F5 Rule 17.1(c) inserted (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 14(c)
